# CWE-502 negative: JSON role change validated before update (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-502-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type roleChangeRequest struct {
	UserID uint   `json:"user_id"`
	Grant  string `json:"grant"`
}

func ApplyPrivilege(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	var req roleChangeRequest
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	if req.Grant != "viewer" && req.Grant != "editor" {
		http.Error(w, "invalid grant", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?", req.Grant, req.UserID)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
